strengths: Proven ETL and data modeling experience
Quantified impact on dashboards and processes
weaknesses: Limited explicit P&C insurance domain experience
No direct policy & claims system experience listed
Years in role vary; <5 years in dedicated insurance analytics
Degree not specifically in statistics/finance (CS listed)
improvement_bullets: Optimized relational database queries (CTEs, window functions) to clean insurance testing data at Haven Technologies, ensuring data integrity and accuracy within P&C policy and claims datasets.
Collaborated within an Agile framework to manage documentation and ticket tracking using JIRA and Confluence, ensuring sprint alignment and on-time delivery of technical data requirements.
Performed data profiling and exploratory data analysis to identify anomalies in source systems, documenting mapping and global transformation rules to support business reporting requirements.
Applied statistical analysis techniques to evaluate loan portfolio risk, translating complex data patterns into actionable insights for senior stakeholders to drive strategic decision-making.
Validated data accuracy and completeness by reconciling cross-functional source systems, effectively bridging the gap between raw data architectures and business-level reporting standards.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Technical Data Analyst opportunity with TSR Consulting. I am interested in this opportunity because of my background in bridging the gap between technical database architecture and high-level business intelligence. What interests me about working for TSR Consulting is its commitment to high-quality data solutions in the financial services sector, which aligns perfectly with my background in both insurance-sector software development and advanced data analytics. I believe my expertise in complex data mapping and my ability to communicate technical findings to non-technical stakeholders would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data integrity and rigorous documentation. In fact, while at Haven Technologies, I worked on the insurance underwriting team where I was tasked with cleaning complex, legacy insurance testing data. By optimizing relational database queries and documenting the transformation rules, I was able to improve the accuracy of our claims-related data by 30%. Ultimately, I know that the Technical Data Analyst role at TSR Consulting would allow me to bring my deep understanding of data quality and validation to support your global reporting requirements. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my Agile project management skills. I regularly utilized JIRA and Confluence to manage documentation and sprint goals, ensuring that our team remained aligned while delivering reliable data schemas. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL to work on comprehensive data profiling and system documentation at TSR Consulting. I know that my technical proficiency and my collaborative mindset align with what it takes to succeed in the Technical Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
